install: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install "$(cat .nvmrc)" && nvm use "$(cat .nvmrc)" && export PATH="$(dirname "$(nvm which current)"):$PATH" && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
start: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use "$(cat .nvmrc)" && export PATH="$(dirname "$(nvm which current)"):$PATH" && pnpm build:packages

terminals.name: storybook
terminals.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use "$(cat .nvmrc)" && export PATH="$(dirname "$(nvm which current)"):$PATH" && pnpm storybook -- --ci
